title: Debug SDTM VS domain program: baseline flag and unit conversion errors

inputs.prompt: The following SAS program creates the SDTM VS domain but has 3 bugs: (1) VSBLFL (baseline flag) is set to 'Y' when VISITDY > 0 (post-baseline) instead of VISITDY <= 0 (pre-baseline), (2) Temperature unit conversion from Fahrenheit to Celsius uses (F - 32) / 1.2 instead of the correct formula (F - 32) * 5/9, (3) VSTESTCD for Diastolic Blood Pressure is mapped as 'DBP' instead of 'DIABP' per CDISC controlled terminology. Fix all bugs.
